svg.text: AOS — RADIO: "GOOD MORNING. GUIDANCE IS ALIGNING YOUR WINDOW."

svg.text: or stay a while — miss it, and the next window is one orbit (153 min)

svg.text: MOCKUP 01 · ARRIVAL & EARTHRISE · 450 km, 10.3% of the Moon in view · Earth 1.9° true size at 45° horizontal FOV, mid-rise on the limb · exposure keyed to the night side (stars legitimately visible) · night fraction theatrically compressed
